components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button for share, confirm, and publish flows.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; border: 1px solid #ffffff4a; border-radius: 0.58rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.9rem; background: #ffffffe8; color: #101318; font-family: 'Soehne','Avenir Next','SF Pro Text','Segoe UI',sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.35; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ffffff; border-color: #ffffff66; box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.28); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5d77ff99; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Low-emphasis action for cancel and utility controls.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.58rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.9rem; background: transparent; color: #d9dee8; font-family: 'Soehne','Avenir Next','SF Pro Text','Segoe UI',sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.35; letter-spacing: 0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #ffffff08; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5d77ff99; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Single-line input style for title and text entry controls.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" placeholder="Give this share a title" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid #ffffff1c; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.75rem; background: #20242da8; color: #eef2fa; font-family: 'Soehne','Avenir Next','SF Pro Text','Segoe UI',sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.45; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #95a0b4; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5d77ff99; outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Frosted Panel
components.description: Core shell used by docked and modal tool panels.
components.html:
Share Design

Publish and copy a link.
components.css: .ds-panel { border: 1px solid #ffffff17; border-radius: 0.92rem; padding: 1rem; background: #151920e6; color: #e9edf3; backdrop-filter: blur(20px); box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); } .ds-panel-title { margin: 0 0 0.375rem; font-family: 'Soehne','Avenir Next','SF Pro Text','Segoe UI',sans-serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #f0f3f9; } .ds-panel-copy { margin: 0; font-family: 'Soehne','Avenir Next','SF Pro Text','Segoe UI',sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.45; color: #bfc8d8; }

components.name: Shortcut Keycap
components.description: Monospace keyboard hint token used in shortcut rows.
components.css: .ds-kbd { display: inline-block; border: 1px solid #ffffff22; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.375rem; background: #171b26; color: #e7ecf8; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 0.72rem; line-height: 1.2; }

narrative.overview: Kandi uses a night-studio atmosphere where the bracelet remains the hero, and controls stay calm, tight, and dependable. The visual language is compact and tactile, with frosted dark surfaces, precise borders, and one clear interaction accent. This system is built for fast creative iteration, not decorative spectacle. Typography carries most of the hierarchy work: semibold utility text, restrained size steps, and intentional tracking. Panels, dialogs, and chips should read as tools on a craft table, not marketing cards.
keyCharacteristics: Quiet dark shell with restrained color accents.
Tight typographic hierarchy for utility-first workflows.
Frosted surfaces with subtle border contrast.
No templated AI look, every layer feels deliberate.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Blue accent exists for focus and selection, not decoration. If a surface can be understood without blue, keep it neutral.

rules.name: The Utility Density Rule
rules.body: Type scale stays compact and functional. Use weight contrast before large jumps in size.

rules.name: The State-Driven Lift Rule
rules.body: Shadows must explain interaction state or layer priority. Never add shadow as decoration.

dos: Do preserve the compact utility scale (0.77rem to 1.05rem) unless there is a clear hierarchy break.
Do keep focus rings explicit with #5d77ff99 and visible offsets.
Do keep primary actions light-on-dark with strong contrast and semibold text.
Do treat the bracelet editor as the hero, keep shell typography supportive and disciplined.
donts: Don't ship AI slop patterns: generic gradient-heavy SaaS styling, repetitive interchangeable card grids, or decorative chrome without purpose.
Don't introduce gradient text, side-stripe accent borders, or default glassmorphism surfaces.
Don't flatten hierarchy by making every control the same size, weight, and spacing.
Don't hide critical state changes behind low-contrast hover-only cues.
